title: identity — permissions
description: Every permission on this table is scoped to the `platform_admin` guard. The tenant-audience `sanctum` guard NEVER interacts with Identity rows directly. See policies.json for the enforcement layer + boundary_note.

permissions.name: platform.identity.viewAny
permissions.description: List identities (redacted — email fingerprint + metadata only).

permissions.name: platform.identity.view
permissions.description: Show one identity (redacted). See `platform.identity.view.pii` to unmute.

permissions.name: platform.identity.view.pii
permissions.description: Unmute email + dob on identity detail. NEVER unmutes regulated_secret fields. Every use of this permission writes an audit-log entry with the actor + reason. Provisioned narrowly — typically only compliance + security.

permissions.name: platform.identity.unlock
permissions.description: Clear locked_until on an identity. Fires IdentityUnlocked(trigger=admin_action).

permissions.name: platform.identity.force_password_reset
permissions.description: Invalidate the current password + revoke sessions + issue a fresh reset token.

permissions.name: platform.identity.rotate_mfa_secret
permissions.description: Re-encrypt Identity.mfa_secret_encrypted under a fresh KMS data key. Used during key rotation.

permissions.name: platform.identity.erase
permissions.description: Soft-delete an identity (start GDPR hold-period). Compliance-officer scope; audit-critical.

permissions.name: platform.identity.restore
permissions.description: Reverse an in-flight soft-delete before the hold-period elapses.
